data.description: META to run some servers longer on memory shortage - WSJ. $META

data.title: Elegance Moves the World — LEPAS Joins Global Partners to Accelerate into the Year of Delivery
data.description: LEPAS is ramping up its global expansion efforts with the recent hosting of its inaugural Global Partner Conference in Wuhu. At the event, LEPAS unveiled its diverse product portfolio and highlighted its key strategic alliances. The conference, attended by over 200 partners from around the world, signified a significant milestone for the company as it seeks to establish a stronger global presence. This initiative underscores LEPAS's commitment to accelerating its growth on a global scale and fostering collaborations to enhance market reach.

META WILL EXTEND THE OPERATING LIFE OF SOME OF ITS SERVERS IN RESPONSE TO A MEMORY SHORTAGE, STRETCHING THE LIFESPAN OF ITS NON-AI SERVERS FROM SIX TO SEVEN YEARS DUE TO A "SIGNIFICANT SERVER SUPPLY DEFICIT," ACCORDING TO INTERNAL MEMOS — WSJ.

data.title: BODYBAR PILATES TO OPEN FIRST STUDIO IN THE SOONER STATE THIS SUMMER
data.description: A new fitness studio is set to launch in Edmond, bringing exclusive grand opening deals and community events to the area. BODYBAR Pilates, known for its dynamic, reformer-based Pilates workouts, revealed plans to open its inaugural Oklahoma studio in Deer Creek. The studio is scheduled to open in April 29, 2026. This initiative brings a high-energy fitness option to residents, offering unique promotional offers to kick-off its debut. Fitness enthusiasts in Edmond can look forward to engaging in a range of Pilates classes and joining various community events hosted by BODYBAR Pilates.

data.title: DOGE may hit $0.14 before falling to $0.08. Resistance at $0.10 could trigger a 20% drop to $0.08 by summer.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOGE is anticipated to surge to $0.14 after encountering resistance at $0.10, signaling a final push. However, indicators such as weakening momentum and patterns showing distribution by large holders hint at a potential 20% drop to $0.08 by the summer season.

data.title: Solana's price target of $90 within a week as bulls push back, with current price at $84.70. Breakout above $86 resistance can lead to potential gains.
data.description: Solana is currently trading at $84.70 and is showing signs of consolidation. The technical indicators suggest that a breakthrough above the $86 resistance level could potentially lead to a surge towards $90. This short-term selling pressure could present an opportunity for traders who have taken strategic positions in the market.

data.title: ADA whales 69% long as price battle at $0.25 ensues - ADA could hit $0.30 or fall to $0.22.
data.description: With Cardano currently trading at $0.25, significant interest from large investors is noted as they take substantial long positions. However, intense selling pressure is leading to a technical deadlock in the market. The direction of the next significant movement will be crucial, potentially resulting in ADA surging towards $0.30 or facing a decline to the support level of $0.22.

data.title: XRP price at $1.39 with whales accumulating as retail traders exit. Possible 15% surge to $1.60 in two weeks predicted.
data.description: The digital currency XRP is currently priced at $1.39 as institutional investors continue to increase their holdings, contrasting with individual retail traders who are surrendering their positions. This dynamic sets the stage for a probable 15% upturn to $1.60 in the forthcoming two weeks.

data.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Findlay, Ohio, on April 29, 2026, the board of directors of Marathon Petroleum Corp. (NYSE: MPC) announced a dividend of $1.00 per share on common stock. Shareholders of record as of May 20, 2026, will receive the dividend payable on June 10, 2026. The company continues to provide returns to its investors through this dividend distribution.

data.title: Epsium Enterprise Limited Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Macau, April 29, 2026 - Epsium Enterprise Limited (Ticker: EPSM), a leading importer and wholesaler of high-quality alcoholic beverages in Macau, recently disclosed the submission of its fiscal year 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F. This report encompasses the period ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: BNB price to hit $680-$740 by June with 72% institutional long positions at $626. Compression pattern near $600-$650.
data.description: With BNB trading at a price of $626, institutional traders are currently holding 72% long positions. This strong support from institutional traders suggests a potential breakout in the near future, with the price expected to reach between $680 and $740 within the next eight weeks. The price is currently experiencing a compression pattern between $600 and $650, indicating a likely increase in volatility and movement in the coming days.

data.title: Amy Watts Joins Greenfield Savings Bank's Wealth Management Team
data.description: A new financial advisor has joined Greenfield Savings Bank (GSB) to provide customized client strategies for long-term financial planning and wealth management solutions. Amy Watts has recently joined GSB's Wealth Management team in Greenfield, Mass. This addition aims to enhance personalized financial services, ensuring tailored approaches to meet client needs. The appointment signifies GSB's commitment to offering comprehensive wealth management solutions.
